description: This stylish sling bag from murcia is designed for the fashion conscious. Wear it on your shoulder and turn heads wherever you go! Height: 28 cm Width: 30 cm Leatherette upper with contrast stitch detailing A pocket with a magnetic button closure on the front Two main compartments with a zippered pocket One short handle Zippered pocket on the back Buckle design on the sides Bag care Wipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dust
